title: Founder's Folly
description: Resprited vanilla textures galore! Gear, GUI, Hearts, etc.
body:
# Founder's Folly
Resprited vanilla textures galore!
## Features
Revamped all the vanilla tools and weapons, as well as their materials. (Raw copper and Iron aren't changed)

Revamped GUIs to be familiar, but more pleasing and elegant. (Only survival UI, crafting table and recipe book are finished currently)

Revamped all the player hearts. (Need to finish freezing)

Edited Portal and Snowflake particles to look better and more pixel consistent.

There will be more in the future, it's early days yet!

## Optional Mob Models
With [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), or Optifine installed, Spiders, Cave Spiders and Endermites will have revamped models.
